issues.title: 1.0.0-M8 PRE Using ChatClient.Builder to build the client does not correctly identify the tools after adding defaultTools

comments.body:
我是同样的配置，遇到了别的问题，  Caused by: com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.exc.MismatchedInputException: Cannot deserialize value of type `java.lang.String` from Object value (token `JsonToken.START_OBJECT`)
 at [Source: REDACTED (`StreamReadFeature.INCLUDE_SOURCE_IN_LOCATION` disabled); line: 1, column: 689] (through reference chain: org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletion["choices"]->java.util.ArrayList[0]->org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletion$Choice["message"]->org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletionMessage["tool_calls"]->java.util.ArrayList[0]->org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletionMessage$ToolCall["function"]->org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletionMessage$ChatCompletionFunction["arguments"])

It used to work, but now it's behaving differently than expected as the version goes up?

Since `getToolCallbacks` is called in `ToolCallbackProvider`, it feels natural to use `defaultToolCallbacks`. Is there a particular aspect that seems problematic to you?
String content = chatClient.prompt(query).call().content();   使用这个方式调用mcp工具报错

@liu-zhen-wei The issue seems to be different from the issue you are experiencing.
If so, please create a separate issue.

> 该问题似乎与您遇到的问题不同。如果是这样，请创建一个单独的 issue。

Has already been created

> It used to work, but now it's behaving differently than expected as the version goes up?
> 
> Since `getToolCallbacks` is called in `ToolCallbackProvider`, it feels natural to use `defaultToolCallbacks`. Is there a particular aspect that seems problematic to you?

@dev-jonghoonpark  
This change is not stated in the official documentation, so can I assume that the defaultTools method should be marked as deprecated?

> 我是同样的配置，遇到了别的问题， Caused by: com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.exc.MismatchedInputException: Cannot deserialize value of type `java.lang.String` from Object value (token `JsonToken.START_OBJECT`) at [Source: REDACTED (`StreamReadFeature.INCLUDE_SOURCE_IN_LOCATION` disabled); line: 1, column: 689] (through reference chain: org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletion["choices"]->java.util.ArrayList[0]->org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletion$Choice["message"]->org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletionMessage["tool_calls"]->java.util.ArrayList[0]->org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletionMessage$ToolCall["function"]->org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletionMessage$ChatCompletionFunction["arguments"])

嘿，朋友！ 你是在手动触发mcp server吗  现在它最新版本好像 直接配置好默认的chatclient客户端以后 自动会调用函数

> > 我是同样的配置，遇到了别的问题， Caused by: com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.exc.MismatchedInputException: Cannot deserialize value of type `java.lang.String` from Object value (token `JsonToken.START_OBJECT`) at [Source: REDACTED (`StreamReadFeature.INCLUDE_SOURCE_IN_LOCATION` disabled); line: 1, column: 689] (through reference chain: org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletion["choices"]->java.util.ArrayList[0]->org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletion$Choice["message"]->org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletionMessage["tool_calls"]->java.util.ArrayList[0]->org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletionMessage$ToolCall["function"]->org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletionMessage$ChatCompletionFunction["arguments"])
> 
> 嘿，朋友！ 你是在手动触发mcp server吗 现在它最新版本好像 直接配置好默认的chatclient客户端以后 自动会调用函数

我是在同一个工程里面编写了mcp服务，然后在同一个功能里面用智能体调用的，之前M6版本通的，到M7和M8版本就开始报错了，前辈有经验的话给指导一下

> > > 我是同样的配置，遇到了别的问题， Caused by: com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.exc.MismatchedInputException: Cannot deserialize value of type `java.lang.String` from Object value (token `JsonToken.START_OBJECT`) at [Source: REDACTED (`StreamReadFeature.INCLUDE_SOURCE_IN_LOCATION` disabled); line: 1, column: 689] (through reference chain: org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletion["choices"]->java.util.ArrayList[0]->org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletion$Choice["message"]->org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletionMessage["tool_calls"]->java.util.ArrayList[0]->org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletionMessage$ToolCall["function"]->org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$ChatCompletionMessage$ChatCompletionFunction["arguments"])
> > 
> > 
> > 嘿，朋友！ 你是在手动触发mcp server吗 现在它最新版本好像 直接配置好默认的chatclient客户端以后 自动会调用函数
> 
> 我是在同一个工程里面编写了mcp服务，然后在同一个功能里面用智能体调用的，之前M6版本通的，到M7和M8版本就开始报错了，前辈有经验的话给指导一下

mcp server和 client应该是两个端点，互相调用 并且要有固定的端点配置的 ，如果只用FunctionCalling的话一个服务里边就可以实现，直接在chatClient.prompt().user(String question).tools(YouToolMethodClass).call(); 就可以实现
参阅下官方文档
https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/1.0/api/mcp/mcp-overview.html
